rows.content: To create a new printer setup use the EDIT primary or line command.
For example, `e newname` in the primary command field will present a
fill in panel of printer characteristics. Alternately, you can copy
an existing printer setup by placing an `e` on the desired setup and
when the panel comes up, key in a new LOGICAL PRINTER NAME, and any
other differences you want to apply.
LOGICAL PRINTER NAME+- Specify the symbolic name of your choice. This
name appears in the ACTIVE PRINTER field when this logical printer
PRINTER DESCRIPTION+- A brief description of this printer`s
characteristics for your reference.  This description is presented
to the right of the logical printer name in the printer setup select
